title: RuntimeState
description: Runtime sidecar state for a single FQMN.

domain.description: Domain extracted from the FQMN for filtering and partition-style queries.

fqmn.description: Stable identity of the source-aligned object tracked by runtime state.

upsertedAt.description: Canonical UTC timestamp of the last upsert.

deletedAt.description: Canonical UTC timestamp of the last delete mark.

lastSamplingAt.description: Canonical UTC timestamp of the last completed sampling job.

lastLlmGenAt.description: Canonical UTC timestamp of the last completed LLM generation job.
